next_steps: Send stool or serum for Clostridium botulinum toxin and culture
Consult pediatric neurology and infectious disease specialists
Administer Botulism Immune Globulin Intravenous (BIG-IV) if infant botulism is suspected
Continuous cardiorespiratory monitoring for autonomic instability and respiratory failure
Avoid aminoglycoside antibiotics which may potentiate neuromuscular blockade
